name: fetch_yahoo_raw_data
description: Fetches raw league, team, roster, or matchup data from the Yahoo Fantasy API. Requires credentials in config/.env.

endpoint_type.description: The type of data to fetch.

params.description: Optional dictionary of parameters for the API call (e.g., {'count': 10}).

name: fetch_rich_player_data
description: Aggregates enhanced player metrics, injury news recency, and remaining games for waivers or specific teams.

mode.description: Whether to fetch waiver wire candidates or a specific team's roster.

team_id.description: Yahoo Team ID (required if mode is 'team'). Defaults to user's team if omitted.

name: recommend_lineup
description: Analyzes current roster and suggests lineup optimizations (start/bench swaps) based on active games and scores.

date.description: Optional date for analysis in YYYY-MM-DD format.

name: compare_season_matchup
description: Compares season-long statistics between two teams to identify high-level category advantages.

name: analyze_waiver_defense
description: Identifies top defensive specialists (ST/BLK) from the waiver pool based on recent averages and remaining games.

file.description: Path to the rich_stats_waiver.json file. Defaults to data/rich_stats_waiver.json.

name: check_crunch_live
description: Verifies which players on a roster have live games today using ESPN scoreboard data.

name: search_external_intel
description: Searches Reddit r/fantasybball for news and discussions regarding a specific player.

player_name.description: The full name of the basketball player (e.g., 'Stephen Curry').
